clinical_workflow.intended_use: Clinician-controlled documentation scaffold for controlled drug review documentation.
clinical_workflow.not_for: Not for autonomous diagnosis, treatment selection, dosing, disposition, admission/discharge, procedural, imaging, referral, or emergency management decisions.

source_phase1.reason_for_inclusion: Common Pain Medicine documentation scenario suitable as clinician-controlled note scaffolding rather than autonomous clinical advice.
source_phase1.distinct_purpose: Distinct documentation workflow for clinician-selected details around controlled drug review documentation.
source_phase1.duplicate_check_notes: Cleaned Phase 1 candidate. Exact ID is unique within this revised index and must be checked against existing_workflow_ids.json and alias inventory before import; no close baseline workflow assigned in this cleaned index.

safety_notes: No autonomous diagnosis or treatment recommendation is intended.
Red flags are documentation prompts only.
High-risk specialty/workflow: documentation scaffolding only; requires conservative medical review before use.
red_flag_prompts: neurological deficit, infection concern, or uncontrolled severe pain documented if assessed
controlled-drug risk context documented if discussed
procedure-related concern documented without procedural advice

chips.text: Controlled drug review documentation interval history documented
onset/duration documented if discussed
change since last review documented
severity/impact on function documented if discussed
associated symptoms reviewed if relevant
relevant negatives documented if assessed
patient concerns or goals documented if discussed
clinician-led risk context documented
scope limited to documentation scaffolding
Pain site/function documentation documented only if assessed
Neurological findings if assessed documented only if assessed
Medication/procedure history documentation only documented only if assessed
Risk screen documentation documented only if assessed
neurological deficit, infection concern, or uncontrolled severe pain documented if assessed
controlled-drug risk context documented if discussed
procedure-related concern documented without procedural advice
Pain scores/function measures documented if assessed
Prior imaging or procedure reports reviewed if available
Medication history documented if discussed by clinician
clinician-entered documentation plan recorded
senior/specialist discussion documented if already performed
risk/consent discussion documented if clinician completed it
handover or follow-up documentation recorded if arranged by clinician

history_draft.text: Controlled drug review documentation. [Interval history]. [Current symptoms/concerns]. [Change since last review]. [Relevant negatives]. [Clinician-documented discussion]. [Additional history].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Pain site/function documentation documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Neurological findings if assessed documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Medication/procedure history documentation only documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Risk screen documentation documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Pain scores/function measures documented.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Prior imaging or procedure reports reviewed.
investigation_options.output_text: Prior imaging or procedure reports reviewed.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Medication history documented.

plan_options.text: Risk/consent discussion documented if completed by clinician.
Clinician-entered Handover or follow-up documentation recorded.
Senior/specialist discussion documented if already performed.

clinical_blockers: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Medicine, dose, duration, indication, adherence, effect, adverse effects, misuse risk, monitoring, legal checks and prescriber plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for controlled-drug pain review documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
